name: econovaria
description: Repository-wide validation and production-readiness tooling for Econovaria.

scripts.audit: npm run audit:migrations && npm run audit:architecture && npm run audit:assets && npm run audit:admin-contracts && npm run audit:seed-content
scripts.audit:seed-content: npm run audit:seed-content-universe && npm run audit:seed-content-issuers && npm run audit:seed-content-financial && npm run test:seed-content-preflight && npm run preflight:seed-content
scripts.test: npm run audit && npm run test:deployment-readiness && node scripts/admin-session-manager-smoke.mjs && node scripts/admin-shell-smoke.mjs && node scripts/admin-v606-full-drift-audit.mjs
